test.submit_ticket: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/tickets -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"tenantId":"tenant-abc","subject":"Payment not processing","body":"Our payment gateway has been failing for all customers since 2 hours ago."}' | python3 -m json.tool

database.check_tickets: psql -U rumi -d ticket_pipeline -c "SELECT id, status FROM tickets ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;"
database.check_phases: psql -U rumi -d ticket_pipeline -c "SELECT phase, status, attempts FROM ticket_phases ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 4;"
database.check_events: psql -U rumi -d ticket_pipeline -c "SELECT event_type, phase FROM ticket_events ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;"
